creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
Celebrated my birthday on the coziest boat in Dubai @novaboats.ae 

Balloons, flowers, snacks, drinks and that golden sunset with the Burj Khalifa view ✨. Huge thanks to NovaBoats.ae - Couldn’t have asked for more! 

If you’re planning a Dubai birthday trip or just want a private Dubai boat experience, this is it. @novaboats.ae 

#dubai #dubaibirthday #dubaiboatparty #dubaiboat #burjkhalifaview #dubaisunset #novaboats #exploreuae #visitdubai
